task: Implement multilingual (VN/EN) support: MoMorph language dropdown (screen hUyaaugye2), next-intl cookie-based i18n without URL prefix, Supabase-persisted user language preference, home page + header/footer translated
acceptanceCriteria: Language dropdown matches MoMorph Figma design
Selecting EN switches home page copy, html lang, and title to English; VN switches back
Locale persists via NEXT_LOCALE cookie for guests and profiles.language for logged-in users
Migration adds profiles.language with owner-scoped RLS UPDATE policy
vi.json and en.json message catalogs have identical key sets
Full test suite passes and production build compiles clean
blastRadius: All routes render through app/layout.tsx provider
Non-home pages keep hardcoded copy by scope decision
contracts: LanguageDropdown props { value, onSelect, ariaLabel?, className? }
Locale union sourced solely from lib/i18n/locale-config.ts
